Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Phew... Running away is easy enough. It's losing them that's the hard part.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}Still, made for a good workout, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}That was some quick thinking, by the way. Just what I'd expect from our leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I don't exactly like turning my back to an opponent, but it doesn't matter in the end if I can't protect the ones beside me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}And being outnumbered increases our risk of injury or damaging our surroundings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}What I mean is you made the right call. I owe you one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It's addressed to me... Says it contains "fruits, snacks, and beverages."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Looks like it's from my parents. I'll take it to my room later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Yeah. My foster parents that adopted me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I haven't kept in touch lately since I'm so busy, but it sounds like they're doing well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Yeah, it's probably because they think I'm a growing boy and all that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I haven't kept in touch lately since I'm so busy, but I should probably write back and thank them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I appreciate how much they care, but this is a little too generous. Wanna take some of it off my hands?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 3 25 25}Then again, you'll hardly make a dent in this either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Good idea. Would you mind gathering everyone up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Intriguing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Everything is such high quality. I can tell just by looking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Your parents must really care about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}At least you know how to behave in front of your parents, Akihiko.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}...Don't you ever have anything nice to say about me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}My parents have been good to me. I obviously haven't told them about what we do here, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Wow, when it comes to bein' considerate of others, you're a heavyweight! Glad to have you in our corner, Senpai![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}These sure look good, though. Thanks for sharing, Sanada-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Take whatever you want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Hey, this looks really good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Oh, goin' for that one huh, Yuka-tan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Hey, Kirijo-senpai, what's that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Oh, this looks like it was meant for royalty...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Much appreciated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}That took care of most of it. I'm surprised they were so happy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I've really gotta show my gratitude. To my parents, and to everyone here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}All this talk about my parents reminded me of some things from the past, like why I'm here right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I guess I feel like I remember my reason for fighting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Well, don't mind me. Let's just say I've got a lot of room to grow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}The dorm's gotten so much busier. The orphanage used to be something like this, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}We all lived under the same roof, just having casual conversations. I'd forgotten what it was like, but it wasn't so bad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}I remembered after you suggested we share with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}People are always telling me I need to be more aware of things like that, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}I've really gotta repay you in particular though, or we'll never be squared away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}All right, it's pretty late now. I guess we should clean up and call it a night.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's something mixed in here. It's a letter,[n]and some sort of hand-crafted object...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like a gold medal[n]that's made of cardboard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}What? Is there something there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}You won't understand what it means, but it's from a long time ago.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}This medal doesn't really belong to anyone. It's from a long time ago.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Do you mind if I ask you something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}You take on the role of our leader, and you're stronger than anyone else in your own right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}That's more than just being talented. Where do you get that strength from?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_043_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's thanks to the bonds I have.

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}So you mean you're putting in work behind the scenes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}I thought I put a lot of time into training myself, but now I'm not so sure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Oh, I see. You mean you feel motivated because you have people in your corner?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}...Bonds with others, huh. That might be something I'm missing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Heh, so you don't even know what your own secret is? You're on a completely different level.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}But you know, I think that's just how it is for the ones who have true strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}Well, whatever it is, you've clearly got something that I don't.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}But being jealous or trying to copy you isn't gonna help me. That strength is yours alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}I'm going to get stronger... But I'll do it my way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}Sorry, we were supposed to be cleaning up. I'll take care of the rest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}Things got so busy that I missed out on my chance to thank you again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}Hopefully the food was enough for today. I'll invite you out again some other time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I took Sanada's gesture of appreciation,[n]then returned to my room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has[n]improved after seeing how[n]Sanada cares for his parents...[n]{f 1 1}
